content: Just as biological and chemical agents exert specific, targeted effects by only interacting with matching molecular binding sites on host cells, AI agents with bounded working memory rely on constrained, selective information access to produce effective, focused reasoning. This bounded capacity is not a flaw to be eliminated, but a functional feature that helps agents avoid noisy off-target interference and produce consistent, goal-aligned outputs, much like how narrow specificity is a core strength of pathogenic and therapeutic biological agents.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
